summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Perfectly Good features: search/filter functionality, vendor order status management, password reset flow, and seeded data verification. All 35 backend API tests passed (100% success rate). Frontend testing confirmed all UI features working correctly including search, filters, login flows, and vendor dashboard.
passed_tests: 8 seeded drops verified (4 vendors: Bakery, Restaurant, Cafe, Grocery Store)
Search/filter API endpoints: category, search text, max_price, sort_by=price
GET /api/drops/categories returns [Bakery, Restaurant, Cafe, Grocery Store]
Password reset flow: forgot-password and reset-password endpoints
Vendor order status management: picked_up and cancelled status updates
Home page loads with 8 food cards showing images, prices, badges
Search bar filters drops correctly (chicken search returned 1 result)
Category filter chips work (Bakery filter returned 2 items)
Filter panel opens/closes with filter button
Forgot password link on login page works
Reset password flow works end-to-end with auto-filled token
Vendor dashboard accessible with proper tabs
